# @truther/contracts-node

Node.js CommonJS protobuf bindings for Truther Contracts, generated by `protoc-gen-js` (google-protobuf / JSPB).

## Generated code — do not edit

All files in this directory are auto-generated from `proto/transaction.proto` via:

```bash
buf generate
```

The generated file `transaction_pb.js` provides class-based serialization compatible with the Confluent SR serde library.

## Installation

```bash
npm install google-protobuf
# then reference gen/node/ locally:
npm install file:./gen/node
```

## Basic usage

```js
const { Transaction, PredictiveAnalyzer } = require('@truther/contracts-node');

const pa = new PredictiveAnalyzer();
pa.setIsallowed(true);
pa.setReason('approved by risk engine');
pa.setCardid('card-abc-123');
pa.setUserid('user-xyz-456');

const tx = new Transaction();
tx.setTransactionamount('499.99');
tx.setPredictiveanalyzer(pa);
tx.setFinalDecision('APPROVED');

// Serialize to Uint8Array (proto3 binary)
const bytes = tx.serializeBinary();

// Deserialize back
const tx2 = Transaction.deserializeBinary(bytes);
console.log(tx2.getTransactionamount()); // '499.99'
```

## Using with the Kafka serde lib

```js
const { TrutherSerde } = require('@truther/kafka-serde');
const { Transaction } = require('@truther/contracts-node');
const fs = require('fs');

const serde = new TrutherSerde({ srUrl: process.env.SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL });

// At startup — register all schemas
const protoContent = fs.readFileSync('./proto/transaction.proto', 'utf8');
await serde.registerSchema('transactions', protoContent);

// Codec adapter for JSPB classes
const TransactionCodec = {
  encode: (msg) => msg.serializeBinary(),
  decode: (bytes) => Transaction.deserializeBinary(bytes),
};

// Producer: get framed Buffer ready for Kafka
const buf = serde.produce('transactions', tx, TransactionCodec);

// Consumer: decode raw Kafka value
const decoded = await serde.consume('transactions', kafkaMsg.value, TransactionCodec);
```

## Adding a new contract

1. Add your message to `proto/transaction.proto` (or a new `.proto` file).
2. Run `buf generate` from the repo root — this regenerates `transaction_pb.js`.
3. Export the new class from any consumer that needs it.
4. Call `serde.registerSchema('<your-topic>', protoContent)` at startup.

Do not commit a `dist/` folder — source is the single source of truth.
